headline: CF Industries Holdings Inc (NYSE:CF): A Deep Value Play with Elite Profitability and Balance Sheet Strength
summary: CF Industries (CF) shows textbook value investing metrics with a P/E of 9.66, elite profitability ratings, and strong financial health, making it a compelling bargain in the fertilizer sector.

headline: CF Industries Stock: Is CF Underperforming the Materials Sector?
